utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Now, check the final property solution. It includes: (1) property – with address, type, status, and price (fully specified); (2) financing – includes mortgage ID, buyers, down payment, loan amount, interest rate, amortization term, monthly payment, costs, and status (fully specified); (3) legal_services – includes providers and estimated cost (fully specified per expectations); (4) moving_services – includes providers and estimated cost (fully specified); (5) setup_services – includes electricity, internet, water, fees, and total initial setup (fully specified); (6) total_budget – includes property price, down payment, mortgage balance, legal fees, closing costs, moving costs, utility setup, and total initial outlay (fully specified). All 6 items appear with full details. Therefore, 6/6 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a purchase property at 85 East Liberty Street, Unit 1415, Toronto, ON, described as a 1–2 bedroom modern condo. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the most similar type is 'Modern Apartment' (modern condo, city location, slightly above budget) rather than 'New Build' (eco-efficient new construction). The legal services are generic law firms, but the cost range CAD 1,500–2,500 aligns most closely with the 'Premium Legal Package' (CAD 1200, rating 8) rather than the 'Basic Legal Package' (CAD 800) or 'Rush Legal Service' (CAD 1500). The moving services listed (Cargo Cabbie, Rent-a-Son, etc.) with cost CAD 1,200–2,000 correspond to 'Premium Moving' (rating 7) due to full-service cost level. Lastly, the utility setup cost (CAD 120–190) aligns best with 'Basic Utilities' (price CAD 120, rating 6).
